form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr7) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track was 3rd-4.02 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Master Catch (1:52.00) in NR up to 105 on March 21 at $11. Before that, 7th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track beaten 19 m by Double Lou (1:49.70) in NR up to 95 on March 14 at $81. Should enjoy a good run from this draw.

formComments.title: TAB

Before that, 7th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track beaten 19 m by Double Lou (1:49.70) in NR up to 95 on March 14 at $81. Should enjoy a good run from this draw.

form.formComment: Resuming after five-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Our Goat at this track over 1609m in a 4yo G3 No NR GH on October 25 at $18. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 3 m win as favourite (Sr4) at this track (2:45.50) beating Tomahawk Bart in 4yo+ NR up to 70 on May 6 at $1.95. Races well fresh and draws nicely so looks set for a bright return.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 600m the near side lugging pole became detached.
Worked forward to obtain the lead passing the 1000m.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 7th (Fr4) over 1609m at this track beaten 23 m by Kingmaker (1:49.60) in No NR on March 7 at $41. The start before was well back in the run when 6th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track was 9th-16.12 at the bell, beaten 8 m by The Answer (1:50.80) in NR up to 95 on February 28 at $10. Has won three trials since last seen in stronger company and draws to advantage.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Sr3) over 1720m at Penrith, at the bell was 9th-16.04 beaten 11 m by Surfers Delight (2:03.30) in NR up to 90 on April 2 at $23. Two runs back 3rd (Fr4) over 1720m at Penrith was 4th-6.15 at the bell, beaten 6 m by The Metal Flyer (2:03.00) in NR up to 90 on March 26 at $2.25. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Finished fourth at his last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 13 metres behind Ripp at Bathurst over 2260m No NR on March 28. Fitter so a good showing is on the cards.

Overraced and pulled hard during the event.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a solid effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 1609m after showing early speed at this track was 4th-7.76 at the bell, beaten a head by Master Catch (1:52.00) in NR up to 105 on March 21 at $1.85. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr4) over 2270m at Riverina Paceway beaten 22 m by Sweet On Lexy (2:40.80) in 4-5yo No NR GH on March 27 at $81. At the run before solid effort when 3rd (Fr4) over 1609m at this track was 7th-12.5 at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Master Catch (1:52.00) in NR up to 105 on March 21 at $13. Draws wide but can play a role with even luck.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth after being driven well back, behind Master Catch at this track over 1609m in a NR up to 105 on March 21 at $41. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2 m finishing second behind South Seas Rock at this track over 2300m in a NR up to 95 on March 27 at $34. Draws out but is heading the right way.
